Meaning.Vi: kim (dùng để may, tiêm, hoặc trong la bàn)
Meaning.En: A slender, pointed instrument, typically made of metal, used for sewing, medical injections, or in a compass.
Meaning.Example: She threaded the needle carefully before starting to sew.

Situation.En: Using a needle to sew fabric

Situation.Vi: Bác sĩ tiêm thuốc bằng kim tiêm
Situation.En: A doctor administering an injection with a syringe needle

Situation.Vi: Kim la bàn chỉ hướng bắc
Situation.En: The needle of a compass pointing north

Meaning.Vi: kim (trong máy dệt, máy may công nghiệp)
Meaning.En: A component of a sewing machine or loom that pierces fabric to form stitches.
Meaning.Example: The sewing machine jammed because the needle was bent.

Situation.Vi: Thợ may thay kim máy may khi kim bị cùn
Situation.En: A tailor replaces the sewing machine needle when it becomes dull

Meaning.Vi: kim (hình dạng kim, vật nhọn như kim)
Meaning.En: A thin, sharp, pointed object resembling a sewing needle in shape.
Meaning.Example: The cactus had long, needle-like spines.

Situation.Vi: Cây thông có lá dạng kim
